geography.data_source: NMMC ward boundaries; area from NMMC/CIDCO Development Plan; includes Vashi, Nerul, Belapur, Kharghar, Panvel nodes

demographics.data_source: Census 2011 Navi Mumbai (NMMC area); density = population/area; household size from NSSO 76th Round; literacy from Census 2011 Thane district urban (Navi Mumbai section); SC/ST from Census 2011

income_profile.data_source: Median from PLFS 2022-23 Navi Mumbai urban area; distribution slightly right-skewed reflecting IT/corporate parks (Airoli, Belapur); lower informal rate due to planned city character with CIDCO-regulated commercial spaces; occupations from MIDC Taloja/Airoli data, JNPT port employment, and CIDCO commercial surveys

commute_profile.data_source: Trans-harbour commute to Mumbai for many workers; MCTS 2016 + NMMC transport survey; Navi Mumbai Metro Line 1 (Belapur-Pendhar) under construction; higher car ownership due to wider roads and parking in planned city; rail via Harbour Line

sensitivity_parameters.data_source: Moderate fare sensitivity; higher institutional trust due to CIDCO-planned infrastructure quality; lower political mobilisation reflecting newer city with less entrenched political networks; Lokniti-CSDS 2024 Thane district sub-sample

social_network_parameters.data_source: Lower clustering than organic Mumbai zones reflecting planned city grid layout with less organic community formation; moderate cross-income bridging from diverse residential sectors; lower tier2 density in newer planned city

informal_economy_nodes.data_source: Vashi APMC is one of Asia's largest wholesale markets (shifted from Crawford Market); APMC trading records and NMMC employment data
Informal service economy in CBD Belapur commercial district; estimated from CIDCO commercial space occupancy data
Food and transport services serving Airoli Knowledge Park IT workers; estimated from IT park employment data
Nerul sector markets; NMMC trade license data
Vendors near Kharghar station serving new residential development; footfall from Harbour Line station data

tier1_agent_archetype_weights.data_source: Middle Income Residential template from AGENT_SPEC.md adjusted: tech_knowledge_worker added at 0.12 reflecting Airoli IT Park presence; formal_sector_employee reduced to 0.28; sum = 1.00

tier2_agent_types.data_source: Tier 2 counts from NMMC elected representatives, CIDCO authority structure, Navi Mumbai housing society federation, and local press corps
